bai 1 gong fang jian bei: White 1 serves both offense and defense.
bai a duo guo bian wu: White A leads to an unstable position.
bai a hei ke tuo xian: If White A, Black can tenuki.
bai di da,shi bai tu: White's territory is small. Failure diagram.
bai hao xing,shi bai tu: White has good shape. Failure diagram.
bai jiang lai yao zou a wei,shao 1 mu: White will need to play at A later, losing 1 point.
bai jiao qiang xing,bai 1 huan zhao: White forces the corner; White 1 is an exchange.
bai ku zhan,shi bai: White has a difficult fight. Failure.
bai miao zhe a,hei b shi ke tuo xian: If White aims at A, Black can tenuki at B.
bai mo yang da,hei bu hao: White's framework is large; bad for Black.
bai ru a ying,b shou duan wu,ru bu ying: If White answers at A, the follow-up at B is gone; if White ignores, Black plays A.
bai zhong,bai a huan,dui zhong jian hei: White is heavy. If White exchanges at A, pressure on Black in the center is reduced.
bai zhong,ru tuo xian,hei 6 yan li: White is heavy. If tenuki, Black 6 is severe.
bang zhu chu tou de duan: A cutting point that helps escape.
ding xing de duan: A cutting point from the joseki.
fang hei a c duan,zuo bian fa zhan: Prevents Black's cut at A/C; allows development on the left.
gei bai diao zi,shang bian hei bian ruo: Gives White a sacrifice; Black becomes weak on the upper side.
hei 1 miao zhe 2 chu bai qi: Black 1 aims to capture White at 2.
hei a bai ke tuo xian: If Black A, White can tenuki.
hei bu shi fen,shi bai tu: Not satisfactory for Black. Failure diagram.
hei fan er cheng bei gong dui xiang,: Black instead becomes the target of attack.
hei huan,bai a can: Black is too slow; White at A causes lasting damage.
hei xian shou fang zhu bai chong chu: Black has sente; prevents White from breaking through.
hei zhong,bai diao zi,bai cheng hou shi,: Black is heavy; White sacrifices stones and becomes thick. Failure diagram.
hou shou,ru tuo xian, ze gong huo: Gote. If tenuki, results in seki.
huan,dui hei ya li xiao,chu tou ye man: Exchange; pressure on Black is reduced; escaping is also slow.
miao zhe jie de duan: Aims at the cutting point of the connection.
shang bian bai qiang,shi bai tu: White is strong on the upper side. Failure diagram.
shi bai tu,2 wei ji suo: Failure diagram. Two positions are squeezed.
shi bai tu,bai a can,hei bao: Failure diagram. White A is painful; Black surrounds.
shi bai tu,bai shi da,qing ru kun nan: Failure diagram. White's influence is large; invading is difficult.
shi bai tu,bai shou shou,hei hao diao zh: Failure diagram. White is passive; Black adjusts to good shape.
shi bai tu,bai shun diao zhi li,a duan c: Failure diagram. White captures in sequence; the cut at A is painful.
shi bai tu,bai wai shi hou: Failure diagram. White's outside is thick.
shi bai tu,bai wai shi qiang da: Failure diagram. White's outside strength is overwhelming.
shi bai tu,dui bai ya li xiao: Failure diagram. Pressure on White is reduced.
shi bai tu,dui bai ya li xiao,a wei can: Failure diagram. Pressure on White is reduced; A is painful.
shi bai tu,dui bai ya li xiao,bai zhan 6: Failure diagram. Pressure on White is reduced; White occupies 6 positions and can fight contentedly.
shi bai tu,hei bu shi fen: Failure diagram. Not satisfactory for Black.
shi bai tu,hei hou shou,ru a duan,yin we: Failure diagram. Black is gote. If cutting at A, White has proper shape and is unafraid.
shi bai tu,hei wu hou xu shou duan: Failure diagram. Black has no follow-up.
shi bai tu,wai ce 2 zi shou shang: Failure diagram. Two outside stones are damaged.
shi bai,hei hou shou,bai jiao da: Failure. Black is gote; White's corner is large.
shun 10 mu yi shang: Gains 10 or more points in sequence.
xian shou fang bai du guo: Sente; prevents White from crossing over.
